<!-- AUTOGENERATED by scripts/gen-readmes.sh — edit scenarios.tsv -->
# NGINX — custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping

custom-to-root-context combined with VAADIN_URL_MAPPING=/ui/*; scenario-local template adds /app prefix translation, a dedicated /app/ui/HILLA/ location that rewrites Hilla push back to /HILLA, and a catch-all for the rest (including /app/ui/connect/* and root-level static resources).

Proxy URL on `http://localhost:9090`: `/app/ui/`

## Configuration

See [docker-compose.yml](./docker-compose.yml) for service definitions.

NGINX template (`nginx/http/custom-to-root-context-servlet-mapping/default.conf.template`):

```nginx
map $http_upgrade $connection_upgrade {
    default upgrade;
    '' close;
}

server {

    listen       80;
    server_name  localhost;

    # Hilla push lives at /HILLA on the backend regardless of
    # vaadin.url-mapping (see vaadin/hilla#289). The browser calls it under
    # the /ui mapping, so the proxy strips both /app and /ui. NGINX
    # longest-prefix matching makes this block win over /app/.
    # /connect/* needs no custom rule — the Vaadin servlet handles it.
    location /app/ui/HILLA/ {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header        Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header        Connection $connection_upgrade;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080/HILLA/;
    }

    # Catch-all: strip the public /app prefix and forward everything else to
    # the backend root. Covers /app/ui/* (Vaadin servlet, including
    # /ui/connect/* and /ui/VAADIN/push), root-level static resources
    # (/VAADIN/*, /sw.js, /styles.css, /manifest.webmanifest, /icons/*,
    # /images/*) and root-level routes (/test-redirect, /info, ...).
    location /app/ {
        proxy_set_header        Host $host;
        proxy_set_header        X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header        X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
        proxy_set_header        Upgrade $http_upgrade;
        proxy_set_header        Connection $connection_upgrade;

        proxy_pass http://vaadin:8080/;
        proxy_redirect $scheme://$host/ $scheme://$http_host/app/;
        proxy_cookie_path / /app;

        # Can be tuned if the Vaadin PUSH websocket gets closed unexpectedly
        # proxy_read_timeout 90
    }
}
```
